01 — You & Me

You're Mine.

You're the thought that stays
long after I've tried to let go.
The name my hands remember
before my mind catches up.
Mine in every room.
Mine in every argument.
Mine in any situation.
Mine in from the day i laid my eyes on you.
Mine even when I was too scared to say it.
Le Lame —
still mine.
Always mine.
If you'll still have me. 🥲

02 — What I know for certain

Why I Love You

  • 01
    Your persistenceNobody has fought for me the way you do. Three times you pulled me back — not because you had to, but because you actually wanted me here. That kind of love is rare, Boba.
  • 02
    How deeply you see meYou notice everything. The things I don't say out loud. You pay attention in a way no one ever has — and it used to terrify me. Now I realise that's exactly what I always needed.
  • 03
    Your honestyEven when it's hard to hear. You tell me the truth because you actually care what happens to me. That's not something you find everywhere.
  • 04
    The way you loveGenuinely. Without keeping score. Without conditions"sometimes". Being loved by you is something I refuse to take for granted.
  • 05
    Your wife energyNobody has ever been on my side like that. As observant, as real, as deeply in my corner as you are. You move different. I don't say that lightly.

03 — What changes now

When I'm scared or insecure I'll say it out loud — to you — instead of turning it into a fight you have to survive.

The fears I carry aren't yours to carry too. I'm actively working on that. Not just saying it.

04 — One more thing, Boba

01

"There is nobody I want in my space, my life, my bed, my future — the way I want you."

The way you move. The way you smell when you're close. The way your voice drops when you're being serious. I notice all of it. I always have.

Being away from you does something to me I don't want to keep feeling. I miss you. The warmth of you. The closeness. The way it feels to have you near me.

i love everything we do together . The mornings, the late nights, the laugh that gets you — all of it.

02

"I'm not just in love with you. I'm addicted to you."

The way you look at me when you think I'm not watching. The way your voice changes at night when it's just us.

I want my hands on you. I want to be the reason you can't sleep. I want all the versions of you — the soft ones, the loud ones, the ones only I get to see.

You were made to be wanted like this. And I want you. Badly. Completely.

30th ❤️
Our Anniversary — This Month
"Loving you is a journey I am willing to take, every single day."

Every moment with you — the good ones, the hard ones, the quiet ones at 2am — I'd choose all of it again. Because it's you. Because it's us.

Happy anniversary, Boba. Here's to every day after this one. 🥲❤️

And now the real question

Will you accept my apology?

Let's work this out together 🥲

One more

Continue being my wife?

You know the answer, Boba 🥲

Finally. Finally.

You said yes. And I am not going to waste it this time.

No more running. No more walls. No more making you fight alone for something we both want.

Just me — all in, for you — the way you always were for me.

My person. My wife. My Le Lame.

Now come here. 🥲

❤️ Always yours — your person

"Body to body, skin to skin — that's where I feel most like yours."

The way we fit together. The heat between us when there's nothing between us. The way your hands know exactly where to go and mine know exactly how to hold you.

I want that closeness back. All of it. Slow, close, just us.

This weekend, Le Lame. I owe you everything. 🥲🔥
